statement: When SPY daily closes within 1% above the 200-day SMA, SPY closes higher 10 trading days later at a rate above 65% — tested over 5 years (Jan 2019–Dec 2023), 52 occurrences, 73% positive.
test_type_justification: Price respects level/zone: trigger is price entering a zone above a specific moving average level; outcome is measured directionally.
